title: DimensionViewCaptureSettings
description: DimensionViewCaptureSettings: View capture settings class with control over the final size of the image in pixels.

Width.description: Width (in pixels) of the final image.

Height.description: Height (in pixels) of the final image.

FileFormat.description: File format to be used. Defaults to png.

DrawAxes.description: Controls if the world axes should be captured or not.

DrawGrid.description: Controls if the grid should be captured or not.

DrawGridAxes.description: Controls if the grid axes should be captured or not.

TransparentBackground.description: Controls if the background should be transparent.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
